user.title: ABL eMS Home
user.description: Enter the connection details for your ABL eMS Home unit. The host is the IP address or hostname (e.g. ems-home-12345678) and the password is printed on the rating plate of the unit.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the eMS Home unit. Check host and port.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This eMS Home unit is already configured.
